The '''Twi'lek Ruling Council''' was the [[Head clan (Ryloth)|ruling council]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]'s [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Lessu City/Legends|Lessu]].

==History==
Centralized in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Lessu City/Legends|Lessu]], the Ruling Council was formed by five [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] who represented the Twi'lek clans, and were responsible for community decisions in the city. This system was extremely effective for hundreds of years. When one councilmember died, all the remaining members were to walk the [[Bright Lands]], where they would die for certain.

Known council members throughout the years:
*[[Ro Fenn]]
*[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]
*[[Pol Secura]]
